label: BMW i3 / i3s (SME battery management ECU). Partial: full per-byte map for newer i4/iX is not publicly published.

ecu.notes: BMW F-/I-series uses ISO-TP extended addressing on bus PT-CAN/F-CAN at 500 kbps. Tester address 0xF1 prepended; SME ECU address is 0x07 (request 0x6F1 with 1st payload byte = 0x07; response 0x607 with 1st payload byte = 0xF1). OVMS module sets I3_ECU_SME_TX = 0x6F1 and I3_ECU_SME_RX = 0x607.

fields.notes: ALTERUNG_KAPAZITAET_TS - remaining storage capacity (max-Ah aging tracker). Divide raw uint32 by 1000. SOH% = value / nominal Ah * 100.
STAT_LADEZUSTAND_BMS - displayed SOC %. Confirmed in OVMS i3 module and Deep OBD .prg files.
STAT_SPANNUNG_BATTERIE_HV - HV battery terminal voltage. uint16 / 100.
STAT_STROM_BATTERIE_HV - HV battery current; signed int16 / 10. Positive = discharge.
Pair of uint16 millivolt values: min, max.
Polled from KOMBI cluster ECU (TX=0x6F1, RX=0x612), not SME. Estimated range.

unavailable_fields.per_cell_voltages_array: Individual cell voltages (96 cells) are reported via SME but distributed across multiple DIDs not collated in any single public table; OVMS i3 currently only collects min/max. Per-cell map exists in EDIABAS .prg but is not redistributable.
unavailable_fields.charge_port_temperature: Not documented in OVMS poll list.
unavailable_fields.i4_iX_ix1_ix3_decode: Newer BMW EVs (Gen5 EME/eDrive) use different DIDs; no comprehensive public byte-level table found.
